highlights.item: Homepage seed content has been reworked toward a real exterior-cleaning marketing site instead of the template fallback.
Instant quote UX is live on the homepage and posts usable lead data into Payload form submissions.
Launch polish is now actively tracking the shared public/admin visual system, including theme tokens, typography, and QA for login/admin shells.

The homepage renderer now drops placeholder seed media on `home` and uses masked section shells so service, pricing, and CTA content read like intentional marketing panels instead of template leftovers.

The live homepage now uses a compact code-viewer style service surface with icon-led tabs, inline `Start estimate` actions in the file rail, and a side-by-side detail pane instead of stacked service/pricing explainer grids.

The seeded public-site narrative now includes a founder-story `about` page plus a homepage panel that explains the business as two young entrepreneurs building serious operating experience ahead of college.

next.item: Finish the seeded homepage, about page, pricing, and proof content so the live site matches the new quote flow after the next reseed.
Add a quick-edit admin path for reviews, testimonials, and before/after proof.
Complete launch QA across public routes, login, and admin screens after reseed.
